title: Come Dance with Me!
writer: Gérard Oury, Jean-Charles Tacchella, Louis C. Thomas
actors: Brigitte Bardot, Henri Vidal, Dawn Addams
plot: Handsome dentist Herve Dandieu, temporarily separated from his new, delectable wife Virginie by a lovers' tiff, is picked up by sexy dance teacher Anita Flores...object blackmail. Sensing trouble, Virginie follows him to the dance...
